title: The new Halo remake is a reminder of what Xbox used to be
summary: Halo: Campaign Evolved is excellent, but it’s launching at a very awkward time. Called Halo: Campaign Evolved , the remake is exactly what it sounds like: a modern overhaul of the original game’s story campaign.
caption: output/2026-07-23/the-new-halo-remake-is-a-reminder-of-what-xbox-used-to-be.txt
